name: Quick Meat Sauce for Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a medium-sized pot.
2. Add garlic, meat (ground beef and ground pork), tomatoes, tomato paste, stock, salt, pepper, and bay leaf to the pot.
3. Simmer uncovered for at least one hour.
4. During the last 15 minutes of cooking, add mushrooms.
5. Season with basil and/or oregano.
6. Serve over pasta.
7. Grate Parmesan cheese over each serving.
